creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
beech       2007-09-24 21:38:43 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    mail                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/phplist         Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    mail/phplist/files   phplist.in pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  - New port phplist-2.10.4
  
  Phplist is an email announcement delivery system. It is great for
  newsletters, publicity lists, notifications, and many other uses.
  
  Phplist has many features, including:
  
      * double opt-in subscription mechanism
      * scheduling
      * RSS
      * list segmentation
      * click-tracking
      * attachments
      * bounce management
  
  PR:             ports/115799
  Submitted by:   Nick Hilliard <nick@foobar.org> (maintainer)
  Approved by:    sat (mentor)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.872     +1 -0      ports/mail/Makefile
  1.1       +41 -0     ports/mail/phplist/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/mail/phplist/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +18 -0     ports/mail/phplist/files/phplist.in (new)
  1.1       +35 -0     ports/mail/phplist/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/mail/phplist/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +1199 -0   ports/mail/phplist/pkg-plist (new)
